subcodes.first_line: O thou glass ignited with light from the Lamp of Bahá! ... And as to what thou didst ask concerning the second verse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الزجاج المقتبس الانوار من سراج البهاء ... و اما ما سئلت من الایۀ الثانیۀ
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for women, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
